Operation 'get-v1-feeds' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. The current description lacks important details about what information is returned and the operation's purpose in the context of browser automation. Added clarity about return format (array of feed objects), authentication requirement, and use case context to help AI agents understand when to use this operation. Enhanced summary to be more action-oriented and specific about the retrieval action.

data.current_description: Get a list of custom data feeds configured in the workspace
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all configured custom data feeds
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all custom JSON data feeds configured in the workspace. Returns an array of feed objects containing feed metadata, configuration details, and status information. Useful for discovering available data sources for browser automation tasks. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks important details about what information is returned and the operation's purpose in the context of browser automation. Added clarity about return format (array of feed objects), authentication requirement, and use case context to help AI agents understand when to use this operation. Enhanced summary to be more action-oriented and specific about the retrieval action.

message: Operation 'get-v1-account' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks clarity about what specific metrics are returned and authentication requirements. data.current_description: Get current account quota and usage information
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the current account's quota limits and usage metrics. Returns account-level information including total quota, remaining quota, and current usage statistics. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about what specific metrics are returned and authentication requirements. Enhanced version specifies return value structure and authentication dependency for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'get-v1-tasks' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_context. Description mentions pagination but doesn't explain how to use it (missing parameter details). Added clarity about pagination mechanism, return structure, and authentication requirement for AI agents to properly construct requests.

data.current_description: Get a paginated list of all tasks (25 per page)
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of all tasks with 25 results per page. Supports pagination via query parameters. Returns an array of Task objects with metadata. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Description mentions pagination but doesn't explain how to use it (missing parameter details). Added clarity about pagination mechanism, return structure, and authentication requirement for AI agents to properly construct requests.

message: Operation 'get-v1-tasks-by-uid' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Summary uses generic 'Retrieve' verb. Description lacks specificity about what fields are returned and authentication requirements. Improved version clarifies the identifier parameter and return structure for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Get details for a specific task by UID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information for a specific task identified by its unique identifier (UID). Returns the complete Task object including configuration, status, and metadata. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Summary uses generic 'Retrieve' verb. Description lacks specificity about what fields are returned and authentication requirements. Improved version clarifies the identifier parameter and return structure for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'post-v1-tasks-by-task-uid-runs' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description mentions 202 response but lacks details about request body parameters, return structure, and asynchronous execution model. Enhanced version clarifies input expectations, return value structure, side effects (video/screenshot generation), and async nature for AI agents to properly handle the operation.

data.current_description: Create and execute a new run for the specified task. Returns 202 Accepted immediately.
data.description_suggestion: Create and execute a new run for the specified task. Accepts optional input parameters to customize task execution. Returns 202 Accepted immediately with a Run object containing the run UID for status polling. The task executes asynchronously and generates video recordings and screenshots. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Description mentions 202 response but lacks details about request body parameters, return structure, and asynchronous execution model. Enhanced version clarifies input expectations, return value structure, side effects (video/screenshot generation), and async nature for AI agents to properly handle the operation.

message: Operation 'get-v1-tasks-by-task-uid-runs' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks pagination mechanism details and return structure information. Enhanced version clarifies how pagination works, what Run object fields are included, and authentication requirement for better AI agent request construction.

data.current_description: Get a paginated list of runs for the specified task
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of all runs for a specific task. Supports pagination via query parameters. Returns an array of Run objects with execution status, timestamps, and result metadata. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Description lacks pagination mechanism details and return structure information. Enhanced version clarifies how pagination works, what Run object fields are included, and authentication requirement for better AI agent request construction.

message: Operation 'get-v1-tasks-by-task-uid-runs-by-uid' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is vague about what 'results' includes. Enhanced version specifies the Run object structure including media artifacts (video, screenshots) and structured outputs, enabling AI agents to understand what data is available and how to access execution results.

data.current_description: Get the status and results of a specific run
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the complete status and results for a specific run identified by task UID and run UID. Returns the Run object including execution status, timestamps, structured output data, video recording URL, and screenshot URLs. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Description is vague about what 'results' includes. Enhanced version specifies the Run object structure including media artifacts (video, screenshots) and structured outputs, enabling AI agents to understand what data is available and how to access execution results.
